sections.paragraph:
τελέω [τέλος] ‘bring to completion’, of functioning in a manner that leaves nothing undone

—a. to end, a speech or instruction Mt 7:28; 11:1; 13:53; 19:1; a period of time Rv 20:3, 5, 7.

—b. do (completely), of carrying out an action or objective to the fullest extent Mt 10:23; Lk 2:39; 12:50; J 19:28, 30; Ac 13:29; Ro 2:27; Gal 5:16; 2 Ti 4:7; Js 2:8; Rv 11:7; 15:1, 8; 17:17. Of prophecy Lk 18:31; 22:37.

—c. achieve fully, to perfect 2 Cor 12:9.

—d. make payment, pay, of rendering what is due Mt 17:24; Ro 13:6.
